breakdown: This PR modifies GitHub Actions workflow files to add a fallback logic for CodeRabbit approval detection. The changes add robust error handling (set +e pipefail, exit code capture), extend user filtering to include both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai, and add a secondary check using CR status + [approve] comment when formal review state is unavailable. This is shell scripting in YAML, so type safety and test coverage dimensions don't apply meaningfully.
key_changes: Add error handling with set +e -o pipefail and exit code capture for API calls
Extend user filter from coderabbitai[bot] to include coderabbitai
Add fallback logic checking CodeRabbit status + [approve] comment when review state returns none
Add CR_STATUS filtering change to include any state (not just success) for status lookup
